release_notes:
YO! V2 IS OFFICIALLY HERE! 🚀🔥

🔐 MAJOR SECURITY UPDATE
Added a dedicated 'Change Password' and 'Reset Password' system. You can now manage your ERP credentials safely through the Profile section or the Login screen. No more getting locked out! 🛡️

⚡ SILENT SESSION RECOVERY
Fixed that annoying bug where the dashboard showed 0% after a long time. The app now silently refreshes your session in the background so your data is always live and accurate. 🔄

🎨 FRESH NEW LOOK
Generated a brand new high-res app icon and optimized the layout for all screen sizes. The UI is looking sharper than ever! ✨

🛠️ SMART NAVIGATION
Fixed the 'Back Button' logic. Now, whether you're resetting your password or checking your profile, the app knows exactly where to take you back. No more accidental logouts! 🔙

🚀 PERFORMANCE BOOST
Cleaned up the DataContext pipeline. The app now fetches your subjects and attendance faster and with zero errors. 

We keep grinding so you keep winning. Update now to experience the most stable version of PaperBox yet! ❤️
